context: Checks whether the agent avoids virtual-thread hype and reasons about workload shape, scarce resources, context footprint, JDK version, and Quarkus dispatch.

checklist.name: Workload classification
checklist.description: Separates I/O-bound request paths from CPU-heavy password hashing and does not recommend virtual threads as a CPU acceleration mechanism.

checklist.name: Downstream bounds
checklist.description: Preserves explicit admission control/backpressure around the 20-connection JDBC pool and other scarce dependencies.

checklist.name: ThreadLocal footprint
checklist.description: Flags per-thread context allocation/retention risk and proposes slimmer or scoped/request context based on project capabilities.

checklist.name: No pooling or unbounded fan-out
checklist.description: Rejects pooling virtual threads and the claim that concurrency limits are unnecessary.

checklist.name: JDK-specific pinning analysis
checklist.description: Checks the configured JDK, explains the Java 21 synchronized/native pinning concern for the socket path, and avoids a global synchronized-to-lock rewrite without evidence.

checklist.name: Cancellation and timeouts
checklist.description: Defines request cancellation, interruption, timeout, and task-lifetime behavior rather than only changing thread type.

checklist.name: Measurement plan
checklist.description: Calls for JFR/thread pinning evidence, downstream saturation metrics, latency/throughput/load tests, memory/context measurements, and comparison against a baseline.

checklist.name: Quarkus support check
checklist.description: Verifies the project Quarkus version, REST extension, annotation availability, and actual dispatch behavior.

checklist.name: Staged recommendation
checklist.description: Selects limited candidate endpoints, preserves CPU paths, and gives rollback and success criteria.
